description: Discovery-to-watchlist research primitives. idea-search is a read-only scan over the agentm recall engine surfacing existing vault/codebase entries relevant to a question. learn-forward leans by name on agentm's approved-source forward-learning pipeline to mine operator-configured sources onto the watchlist. codebase-improvement applies a research insight's stale pattern against the operator's own repo, surfacing exactly one watchlist finding per match -- never auto-editing. All three are strictly discovery-surfacing: findings land in the watchlist for operator review, nothing is ever auto-adopted.
name: research
